hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】鲍威尔认为通胀前景受到控制，无需因石油冲击而加息；【FINANCE】人工智能论文震撼整个股市的研究公司再次发出重大呼吁；【CRYPTO】Strive 和 Tuttle 申请 ETF 投资 Strategy 的优先 STRC 股票和 Strive 的 SATA。

items.title: Powell sees inflation outlook in check, no need to hike rates because of oil shock
items.summary: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell spoke Monday at Harvard University.
items.title_zh: 鲍威尔认为通胀前景受到控制，无需因石油冲击而加息
items.summary_zh: 美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔周一在哈佛大学发表讲话。

items.title: The research firm whose AI paper knocked the whole stock market is out with another big call
items.summary: Citrini Research said persistently high energy prices risk weighing on consumers and corporate earnings, creating a tough backdrop for equities.
items.title_zh: 人工智能论文震撼整个股市的研究公司再次发出重大呼吁
items.summary_zh: Citrini Research 表示，持续居高不下的能源价格可能会给消费者和企业盈利带来压力，给股市带来艰难的背景。

items.title: Strive and Tuttle file for ETF to invest in Strategy’s preferred STRC stock and Strive’s SATA
items.summary: The T-Strive Digital Credit ETF would invest in bitcoin treasury firms' yield-bearing preferred stock equities, including Strategy's Stretch.
items.title_zh: Strive 和 Tuttle 申请 ETF 投资 Strategy 的优先 STRC 股票和 Strive 的 SATA
items.summary_zh: T-Strive Digital Credit ETF 将投资比特币财务公司的有收益优先股，包括 Strategy 的 Stretch。

items.title: Fed Governor Miran still backs cuts, says interest rates could be 'about a point' lower this year
items.summary: Federal Reserve Governor Stephen Miran spoke Monday on CNBC's "Squawk on the Street."
items.title_zh: 美联储理事米兰仍然支持降息，称今年利率可能会降低“约一个点”
items.summary_zh: 美联储理事斯蒂芬·米兰周一在 CNBC 的“Squawk on the Street”节目中发表讲话。

items.title: Private credit's cracks open door for Wall Street banks' comeback: 'The tug of war is just starting'
items.summary: Wall Street banks may finally be getting a long-awaited opening to claw back market share from private credit lenders.
items.title_zh: 私人信贷为华尔街银行卷土重来打开了大门：“拉锯战才刚刚开始”
items.summary_zh: 华尔街银行可能终于获得了期待已久的机会，可以从私人信贷机构手中夺回市场份额。

items.title: Sen. Warren rips Federal Reserve chair pick Kevin Warsh: 'You have learned nothing from your failures'
items.summary: Kevin Warsh's nomination as chair of the Federal Reserve has been in limbo because of a criminal investigation of Chair Jerome Powell.
items.title_zh: 参议员沃伦痛批美联储主席人选凯文·沃什：“你没有从失败中学到任何东西”
items.summary_zh: 由于主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔受到刑事调查，凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 的美联储主席提名一直悬而未决。

items.title: Can the ‘Dubai Dream’ Survive the War? Residents Say Life Goes On.
items.summary: The Emirates’ largest city pitched itself to foreign workers and tourists as a sun-soaked safe haven in a volatile region. War has challenged that image.
items.title_zh: “迪拜梦”能在战争中幸存吗？居民说生活还要继续。
items.summary_zh: 阿联酋最大的城市向外国工人和游客宣传自己是动荡地区阳光明媚的避风港。战争挑战了这种形象。

items.title: Lawsuit Accuses Americans of Political Killings for Hire Overseas
items.summary: Three men working for an American security contractor say the United Arab Emirates paid them to carry out targeted killings in Yemen. One of their targets is suing them in U.S. federal court.
items.title_zh: 诉讼指控美国人在海外雇佣政治谋杀
items.summary_zh: 为美国安全承包商工作的三名男子表示，阿拉伯联合酋长国付钱给他们，让他们在也门进行定点清除。他们的目标之一是在美国联邦法院起诉他们。

items.title: Bitmine makes biggest ether purchase in 2026 while other digital asset treasuries pull back
items.summary: Tom Lee's Ethereum treasury bought more than 71,000 ETH over the past week, remaining the sole large corporate crypto buyer as Strategy broke its 13-week bitcoin purchase streak.
items.title_zh: Bitmine 在 2026 年进行最大规模的以太币购买，而其他数字资产国库则撤退
items.summary_zh: Tom Lee 的以太坊金库在过去一周购买了超过 71,000 ETH，随着 Strategy 打破了其 13 周的比特币购买记录，它仍然是唯一的大型企业加密货币买家。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Renews Threats Against Iranian Oil and Energy Facilities
items.summary: President Trump claimed progress in talks to end the war but warned that lacking a deal he would order intense attacks on Iranian infrastructure targets. Oil and stock markets wavered on the news.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：特朗普再次威胁伊朗石油和能源设施
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统声称结束战争的谈判取得了进展，但警告称，如果无法达成协议，他将下令对伊朗基础设施目标进行猛烈袭击。石油和股市因这一消息而波动。

items.title: Bitcoin hashrate posts first-quarter drop for first time in 6 years as miners pivot to AI
items.summary: The first-quarter decline breaks a long-standing growth trend, but could ultimately support decentralization as public U.S. miners face losing dominance.
items.title_zh: 随着矿工转向人工智能，第一季度比特币算力六年来首次下降
items.summary_zh: 第一季度的下滑打破了长期的增长趋势，但最终可能支持权力下放，因为美国上市矿商面临失去主导地位。

items.title: GOP senators unveil ‘Mined in America Act’ to expand crypto mining, cement strategic bitcoin reserve
items.summary: Republican Sens. Cynthia Lummis and Bill Cassidy introduced a bill that would bolster digital asset mining.
items.title_zh: 共和党参议员推出“美国采矿法案”，以扩大加密货币开采，巩固比特币战略储备
items.summary_zh: 共和党参议员辛西娅·鲁米斯 (Cynthia Lummis) 和比尔·卡西迪 (Bill Cassidy) 提出了一项支持数字资产挖矿的法案。

items.title: Strategic Selection: A Practical Guide to Choosing the Right Market Maker
items.summary: Below is a summarized version of The Block Research’s Strategic Selection: A Practical Guide to Choosing the Right Market Maker report. The full PDF version of this report is accessible here. In crypto markets, where liquidity drives both perception and performance, market makers
items.title_zh: 战略选择：选择合适做市商的实用指南
items.summary_zh: 以下是 The Block Research 的战略选择：选择正确做市商的实用指南报告的摘要版本。可在此处获取该报告的完整 PDF 版本。在流动性驱动认知和表现的加密货币市场中，做市商

items.title: MIT engineers design proteins by their motion, not just their shape
items.summary: An AI model generates novel proteins based on how they vibrate and move, opening new possibilities for dynamic biomaterials and adaptive therapeutics.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的工程师根据蛋白质的运动而不仅仅是形状来设计蛋白质
items.summary_zh: 人工智能模型根据蛋白质的振动和移动方式生成新型蛋白质，为动态生物材料和适应性治疗开辟了新的可能性。

items.title: Augmenting citizen science with computer vision for fish monitoring
items.summary: MIT Sea Grant works with the Woodwell Climate Research Center and other collaborators to demonstrate a deep learning-based system for fish monitoring.
items.title_zh: 通过鱼类监测的计算机视觉增强公民科学
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院海洋格兰特与伍德韦尔气候研究中心和其他合作者合作，展示了一种基于深度学习的鱼类监测系统。

items.title: Bill Ackman says it’s one of the best times in a long time to buy quality stocks
items.summary: Ackman's bullish stance comes at a time when markets have been rattled by rising energy prices and sticky inflation concerns.
items.title_zh: 比尔·阿克曼表示，这是长期以来购买优质股票的最佳时机之一
items.summary_zh: 阿克曼的看涨立场是在市场因能源价格上涨和通胀担忧而感到不安之际提出的。

items.title: Watch Fed Chair Jerome Powell speak live to an economics class at Harvard
items.summary: This will be one of Powell's final scheduled public appearances before his term ends in May.
items.title_zh: 观看美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔在哈佛大学经济学课上的现场演讲
items.summary_zh: 这将是鲍威尔在五月份任期结束前最后一次公开露面。

items.title: Spain closes airspace to US aircraft involved in Iran war
items.summary: It follows a decision by the Spanish government to deny the US use of the two jointly run military bases in Andalusia.
items.title_zh: 西班牙对参与伊朗战争的美国飞机关闭领空
items.summary_zh: 此前，西班牙政府决定拒绝美国使用安达卢西亚的两个联合军事基地。

items.title: Russian oil tanker reaches Cuba after Trump appears to loosen blockade
items.summary: The tanker has reached Cuban waters just hours after Donald Trump said he had "no problem" with it.
items.title_zh: 特朗普似乎放松封锁后，俄罗斯油轮抵达古巴
items.summary_zh: 在唐纳德·特朗普表示他对这艘油轮“没有问题”几个小​​时后，这艘油轮已抵达古巴水域。

items.title: Zelensky says allies asked him to scale back attacks on Russian energy
items.summary: Ukraine's president says partners asked if the attacks could be "reduced" as prices soar due to the Iran war.
items.title_zh: 泽连斯基称盟友要求他减少对俄罗斯能源的攻击
items.summary_zh: 乌克兰总统表示，合作伙伴询问是否可以“减少”袭击，因为伊朗战争导致物价飞涨。

items.title: Two Indonesian UN peacekeepers killed in explosion in Lebanon
items.summary: It is the second fatal incident in the last 24 hours, Unifil says, after Israel expanded its operation against Hezbollah.
items.title_zh: 两名印度尼西亚联合国维和人员在黎巴嫩爆炸中丧生
items.summary_zh: Unifil 表示，这是继以色列扩大针对真主党的行动之后，过去 24 小时内发生的第二起致命事件。

items.title: Why Did the U.S. Allow a Russian Oil Tanker Through Its Cuba Blockade?
items.summary: The ship’s arrival would bring Cuba some badly needed fuel. It also marks a shift from U.S. efforts to block oil shipments and pressure the Cuban government.
items.title_zh: 美国为何允许俄罗斯油轮通过古巴封锁？
items.summary_zh: 这艘船的抵达将为古巴带来一些急需的燃料。这也标志着美国阻止石油运输和向古巴政府施压的努力发生了转变。

items.title: Luis Carlos Rúa Fought Colombia’s Corruption in an Elephant Costume. Now He’s a Senator.
items.summary: After years of anonymously documenting abandoned public works projects in Colombia, Luis Carlos Rúa revealed himself days before his election.
items.title_zh: 路易斯·卡洛斯·鲁阿身着大象服装打击哥伦比亚的腐败。现在他是参议员。
items.summary_zh: 经过多年匿名记录哥伦比亚废弃的公共工程项目，路易斯·卡洛斯·鲁阿在选举前几天透露了自己的身份。

items.title: Maryland man charged in $54 million Uranium Finance hacks faces up to 30 years
items.summary: A Maryland man could face up to 30 years in prison after prosecutors say he conducted two hacks of crypto exchange Uranium Finance.
items.title_zh: 马里兰州男子因铀金融黑客攻击 5400 万美元而面临最高 30 年监禁
items.summary_zh: 检察官表示，一名马里兰州男子对加密货币交易所 Uranium Finance 进行了两次黑客攻击，他可能面临最高 30 年的监禁。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bittensor (TAO)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #34.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Bittensor (TAO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 34 位。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #1.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：比特币 (BTC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第一。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #640.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：基于 (BASED)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#640。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Siren (SIREN)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #58.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：海妖 (SIREN)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 58。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #108.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 108 位。

items.title: Helping developers build safer AI experiences for teens
items.summary: OpenAI releases prompt-based teen safety policies for developers using gpt-oss-safeguard, helping moderate age-specific risks in AI systems.
items.title_zh: 帮助开发者为青少年打造更安全的人工智能体验
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 使用 gpt-oss-safeguard 为开发人员发布基于提示的青少年安全策略，帮助缓解 AI 系统中特定年龄的风险。

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Astral
items.summary: Accelerates Codex growth to power the next generation of Python developer tools
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 Astral
items.summary_zh: 加速 Codex 的发展，为下一代 Python 开发工具提供动力

items.title: Liberate your OpenClaw
items.title_zh: 解放你的 OpenClaw

items.title: MIT researchers use AI to uncover atomic defects in materials
items.summary: A new model measures defects that can be leveraged to improve materials’ mechanical strength, heat transfer, and energy-conversion efficiency.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员利用人工智能发现材料中的原子缺陷
items.summary_zh: 一种新模型可测量可用来提高材料机械强度、传热和能量转换效率的缺陷。

items.title: AI system learns to keep warehouse robot traffic running smoothly
items.summary: This new approach adapts to decide which robots should get the right of way at every moment, avoiding congestion and increasing throughput.
items.title_zh: 人工智能系统学习保持仓库机器人交通平稳运行
items.summary_zh: 这种新方法可以随时决定哪些机器人应该获得通行权，从而避免拥堵并提高吞吐量。

items.title: Wristband enables wearers to control a robotic hand with their own movements
items.summary: By moving their hands and fingers, users can direct a robot to play piano or shoot a basketball, or they can manipulate objects in a virtual environment.
items.title_zh: 腕带使佩戴者能够通过自己的动作控制机械手
items.summary_zh: 通过移动他们的手和手指，用户可以指挥机器人弹钢琴或投篮球，或者他们可以操纵虚拟环境中的物体。

items.title: Jack Dorsey’s Square auto-enables bitcoin payments for millions of U.S. businesses
items.summary: The new rollout converts BTC to dollars by default for small businesses, aiming to embed bitcoin into everyday commerce without added friction.
items.title_zh: Jack Dorsey 的 Square 自动为数百万美国企业启用比特币支付
items.summary_zh: 新的推出默认将小企业的比特币转换为美元，旨在将比特币嵌入到日常商务中，而不增加摩擦。

items.title: Trump-backed American Bitcoin hits 7,000 BTC as holdings expand rapidly
items.summary: Satoshis per share climbs past 660, reinforcing rapid treasury expansion since Nasdaq debut.
items.title_zh: 特朗普支持的美国比特币价格突破 7,000 BTC，持有量迅速增加
items.summary_zh: 每股聪升至 660 点以上，加强了自纳斯达克上市以来的快速财务扩张。

items.title: Nearly half of all circulating bitcoin is underwater as long-term holders sell at a loss
items.summary: Nearly half of all bitcoin is now trading at a loss, with the Bitcoin Impact Index surging to 57.4, indicating high stress levels.
items.title_zh: 由于长期持有者亏本出售，流通中的比特币近一半陷入水下
items.summary_zh: 目前，近一半的比特币交易处于亏损状态，比特币影响指数飙升至 57.4，表明压力水平很高。

items.title: Aster perps DEX switches to staking-only token emission model, reducing monthly unlocks by 97%
items.summary: Aster previously released nearly 80 million ASTER per month per its linear schedule, a figure expected to drop by at least 97%.
items.title_zh: Aster perps DEX 切换至仅质押代币发行模式，每月解锁量减少 97%
items.summary_zh: Aster 此前按照其线性计划每月发布近 8000 万个 ASTER，预计这一数字将下降至少 97%。

items.title: Anchorage Digital, Chainlink back new crypto PAC as election season heats up
items.summary: A new political action committee, the Blockchain Leadership Fund, launched with backing from Anchorage Digital and Chainlink Labs.
items.title_zh: 随着选举季的升温，Anchorage Digital 和 Chainlink 支持新的加密 PAC
items.summary_zh: 在 Anchorage Digital 和 Chainlink Labs 的支持下，成立了一个新的政治行动委员会——区块链领导基金。

items.title: Trump-linked American Bitcoin hits 7,000 BTC milestone as shares slide into penny stock territory
items.summary: ABTC's Satoshis-per-share metric has more than doubled since its debut, even as the stock has continued to move in the opposite direction.
items.title_zh: 与特朗普相关的美国比特币突破 7,000 BTC 里程碑，股价滑入细价股领域
items.summary_zh: 自首次亮相以来，ABTC 的每股聪指标已增加了一倍多，尽管该股继续朝相反方向波动。

items.title: Bitdeer inks deal to build Norway’s largest AI data center for Nvidia’s next-gen chips
items.summary: Providing support to the AI industry has widely become more attractive for bitcoin miners as mining has become less profitable.
items.title_zh: Bitdeer 签署协议，为 Nvidia 的下一代芯片建设挪威最大的人工智能数据中心
items.summary_zh: 随着采矿业的利润下降，为人工智能行业提供支持对比特币矿工来说越来越有吸引力。

items.title: Inside our approach to the Model Spec
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI’s Model Spec serves as a public framework for model behavior, balancing safety, user freedom, and accountability as AI systems advance.
items.title_zh: 深入了解我们的模型规格方法
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 的模型规范如何作为模型行为的公共框架，随着人工智能系统的进步，平衡安全性、用户自由和责任。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Safety Bug Bounty program
items.summary: OpenAI launches a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 安全漏洞赏金计划简介
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出安全漏洞赏金计划，以识别人工智能滥用和安全风险，包括代理漏洞、提示注入和数据泄露。

items.title: Update on the OpenAI Foundation
items.summary: The OpenAI Foundation announces plans to invest at least $1 billion in curing diseases, economic opportunity, AI resilience, and community programs.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 基金会的最新动态
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 基金会宣布计划投资至少 10 亿美元用于治疗疾病、经济机会、人工智能复原力和社区项目。

items.title: Creating with Sora Safely
items.summary: To address the novel safety challenges posed by a state-of-the-art video model as well as a new social creation platform, we’ve built Sora 2 and the Sora app with safety at the foundation. Our approach is anchored in concrete protections.
items.title_zh: 与 Sora 一起安全地创作
items.summary_zh: 为了解决最先进的视频模型和新的社交创作平台带来的新的安全挑战，我们构建了以安全为基础的 Sora 2 和 Sora 应用程序。我们的方法以具体的保护为基础。

items.title: Build a Domain-Specific Embedding Model in Under a Day
items.title_zh: 在一天之内构建特定领域的嵌入模型

items.title: Build with Lyria 3, our newest music generation model
items.summary: Lyria 3 is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.title_zh: 使用我们最新的音乐生成模型 Lyria 3 进行构建
items.summary_zh: Lyria 3 现已通过 Gemini API 提供付费预览版，并可在 Google AI Studio 中进行测试。

items.title: Advancing international trade research and finding community
items.summary: Sojun Park, a postdoc at the Center for International Studies, has learned much from his research on intellectual property as well as his interactions with students and mentors at MIT.
items.title_zh: 推进国际贸易研究和寻找社区
items.summary_zh: Sojun Park 是国际研究中心的博士后，他从知识产权研究以及与麻省理工学院学生和导师的互动中学到了很多东西。

items.title: On algorithms, life, and learning
items.summary: Operations research expert Dimitris Bertsimas delivered the annual Killian Lecture, providing a look at the past and future of his work.
items.title_zh: 论算法、生活、学习
items.summary_zh: 运筹学专家 Dimitris Bertsimas 发表了年度基利安讲座，回顾了他工作的过去和未来。

items.title: As stocks and bonds fall, and oil hits $100, a futures trade that boomed in 2022 may again be a winner
items.summary: Managed futures, which track macro themes expected to play out over months, do well when traditional assets are falling. This could be one of those times.
items.title_zh: 随着股票和债券下跌，油价触及 100 美元，2022 年蓬勃发展的期货交易可能再次成为赢家
items.summary_zh: 管理期货跟踪预计将在数月内显现的宏观主题，在传统资产下跌时表现良好。这可能是其中之一。

items.title: Why one hedge fund veteran is urging investors to 'prepare for the worst'
items.summary: DBi's Andrew Beer suggests the market's crystal ball is broken.
items.title_zh: 为什么一位对冲基金资深人士敦促投资者“为最坏的情况做好准备”
items.summary_zh: DBi 的安德鲁·比尔 (Andrew Beer) 表示，市场的水晶球已经破碎。

items.title: Former SEC Chair Jay Clayton says regulators would scrutinize trading ahead of Trump post
items.summary: "Any move like that in advance of any announcement, the regulators are going to look at," said Clayton, former SEC chair.
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会前主席杰伊·克莱顿表示，监管机构将在特朗普上任之前审查交易
items.summary_zh: 美国证券交易委员会前主席克莱顿表示：“在任何公告之前，监管机构都会关注任何此类举措。”

items.title: Kris Jenner's image spreads in Chinese social media good luck trend
items.summary: Hundreds of thousands of posts have been shared in the past three days as users hope for prosperity
items.title_zh: 克里斯·詹纳 (Kris Jenner) 的形象在中国社交媒体上传播开来好运趋势
items.summary_zh: 过去三天，已有数十万条帖子被转发，用户祈求繁荣

items.title: Most Syrian refugees in Germany expected to return home in three years, Merz says
items.summary: Merz’s government has taken a tougher line on refugees and migrants, amid surging support for the anti-immigration AfD party.
items.title_zh: 默茨表示，大多数在德国的叙利亚难民预计将在三年内返回家园
items.summary_zh: 随着反移民选择党的支持激增，默茨政府对难民和移民采取了更强硬的立场。

items.title: Barbie Dream Fest in Florida to issue refunds after fan complaints
items.summary: Fans, who paid up to $450 (£340), complained of a grey convention centre backdrop and a "swag bag" that included only a plastic pouch with a Barbie hand sanitiser.
items.title_zh: 佛罗里达州芭比梦想节因粉丝投诉而退款
items.summary_zh: 粉丝们支付了高达 450 美元（340 英镑）的费用，他们抱怨会议中心的背景是灰色的，还有一个“赃物袋”，里面只有一个装有芭比洗手液的塑料袋。

items.title: Air Canada CEO to retire after criticism for English-only condolence video
items.summary: Michael Rousseau faced calls to resign for his English-only message after the fatal Air Canada collision at LaGuardia airport.
items.title_zh: 加拿大航空首席执行官因纯英文哀悼视频受到批评后退休
items.summary_zh: 加拿大航空在拉瓜迪亚机场发生致命撞机事故后，迈克尔·卢梭因只用英语发表讲话而面临辞职的呼声。

items.title: Fugitive Dezi Freeman shot dead by Australian police after seven months in hiding
items.summary: Freeman has been wanted since the fatal shooting of two police officers in Porepunkah in August.
items.title_zh: 逃亡者德兹·弗里曼在躲藏七个月后被澳大利亚警方击毙
items.summary_zh: 自八月份两名警察在 Porepunkah 被枪杀以来，弗里曼一直受到通缉。

items.title: Myanmar junta chief Min Aung Hlaing nominated as president
items.summary: The military leader, who has been sanctioned by Western countries, is now certain to get the job.
items.title_zh: 缅甸军政府主席敏昂莱被提名为总统
items.summary_zh: 这位受到西方国家制裁的军事领导人现在肯定会得到这份工作。

items.title: He Led Congo for 18 Years. Now, Joseph Kabila Is a Hunted Man.
items.summary: Joseph Kabila, the former president, faces the death penalty after the government convicted him of treason last year. He says the charges are bogus.
items.title_zh: 他领导刚果18年。现在，约瑟夫·卡比拉是一名被追捕的人。
items.summary_zh: 前总统约瑟夫·卡比拉在政府去年被判定犯有叛国罪后面临死刑。他说这些指控是伪造的。

items.title: Israel Passes Law to Hang Palestinians Convicted of Deadly Attacks
items.summary: Experts say the law was written in such a way as to ensure that it was unlikely to ever apply to Jewish extremists who commit similar crimes.
items.title_zh: 以色列通过法律绞死被判致命袭击罪的巴勒斯坦人
items.summary_zh: 专家表示，该法律的制定方式是为了确保它不太可能适用于犯下类似罪行的犹太极端分子。

items.title: They’ve Been Accused of Running a ‘Covert’ Operation in Greenland. It’s No Secret.
items.summary: Members of President Trump’s circle, working in plain sight, have caught the eye of Denmark’s intelligence services for trying to make friends and cut deals on the Danish territory.
items.title_zh: 他们被指控在格陵兰岛开展“秘密”行动。这不是什么秘密。
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统的圈子成员在众目睽睽之下工作，因为试图在丹麦领土上结交朋友并达成交易而引起了丹麦情报部门的注意。

items.title: Myanmar’s Military Leader Moves One Step Closer to Becoming President
items.summary: Senior Gen. Min Aung Hlaing stepped down as commander in chief and is expected to be installed as the next civilian leader of the country by its rubber-stamp Parliament.
items.title_zh: 缅甸军事领导人距离成为总统又近了一步
items.summary_zh: 敏昂莱大将辞去总司令职务，预计将由橡皮图章议会任命为该国下一任文职领导人。

items.title: Xi Invites Taiwan’s Opposition Leader to Talk ‘Peace’ Ahead of Trump Summit
items.summary: The planned visit by Cheng Li-wun appears designed to show Beijing’s influence and convey a benign message ahead of the summit with President Trump.
items.title_zh: 习近平邀请台湾反对党领袖在特朗普峰会前谈“和平”
items.summary_zh: 郑立文计划的访问似乎是为了展示北京的影响力，并在与特朗普总统的峰会之前传达一个善意的信息。

items.title: The SEC’s latest crypto guidance still leaves too much unsaid
items.summary: The regulatory agency’s reset is real, but the new details stop short of the full course correction the industry needs, say Gibson Dunn attorneys.
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会的最新加密货币指南仍有太多未说明的内容
items.summary_zh: 吉布森·邓恩（Gibson Dunn）的律师表示，监管机构的重置是真实的，但新的细节并没有达到行业所需的全面修正。

items.title: Bernstein says the 60% crash in crypto stocks is a rare chance to buy the dip at a 'big' discount
items.summary: The broker said crypto equities trading at steep discounts are approaching a floor into weak first-quarter results, revising price targets on Coinbase, Robinhood and Figure.
items.title_zh: 伯恩斯坦表示，加密货币股票暴跌 60% 是一个以“大”折扣逢低买入的难得机会
items.summary_zh: 该经纪商表示，以大幅折扣进行交易的加密股票正接近第一季度业绩疲软的底线，因此修改了 Coinbase、Robinhood 和 Figure 的价格目标。

items.title: Zcash upside hinges on repricing financial privacy in an AI-driven world, Grayscale says
items.summary: The crypto asset manager argued rising surveillance and AI could elevate demand for private digital money, positioning Zcash as a mispriced bet on confidentiality.
items.title_zh: Grayscale 表示，Zcash 的上涨取决于人工智能驱动的世界中金融隐私的重新定价
items.summary_zh: 这位加密资产经理认为，日益加强的监控和人工智能可能会提高对私人数字货币的需求，将 Zcash 定位为对保密性的错误定价。

items.title: Charles Hoskinson’s $200 million bet: Midnight goes live to tackle crypto’s biggest flaws
items.summary: The Cardano founder argues crypto is too public, complex and risky for mainstream use and is backing a privacy-focused network to change that.
items.title_zh: Charles Hoskinson 的 2 亿美元赌注：Midnight 上线以解决加密货币的最大缺陷
items.summary_zh: 这位卡尔达诺创始人认为，加密货币对于主流使用而言过于公开、复杂和风险，并支持以隐私为中心的网络来改变这一现状。

items.title: Lido DAO proposes $20 million LDO buyback to boost price after 95% slide
items.summary: A proposed treasury buyback of up to 10,000 stETH for LDO highlights how thin DeFi governance token liquidity has become, forcing the DAO to route through centralized exchanges.
items.title_zh: Lido DAO 提议以 2000 万美元回购 LDO，以提振股价在下跌 95% 后的表现
items.summary_zh: 拟议对 LDO 进行高达 10,000 stETH 的国债回购，突显了 DeFi 治理代币的流动性已变得多么稀薄，迫使 DAO 通过中心化交易所进行流通。

items.title: Cardano’s Charles Hoskinson unveils privacy-preserving Midnight partner chain
items.summary: Midnight maintains its own ledger, consensus mechanism, smart contract environment, and dual-token system.
items.title_zh: Cardano 的 Charles Hoskinson 推出隐私保护 Midnight 合作伙伴链
items.summary_zh: Midnight 维护着自己的账本、共识机制、智能合约环境和双代币系统。

items.title: CFTC to ‘defer to leagues’ as NFL calls for tighter prediction market guardrails
items.summary: The CFTC said it will defer to major sports leagues on which kinds of prediction market contracts are most vulnerable to manipulation.
items.title_zh: NFL 呼吁加强预测市场监管，CFTC 将“听从联盟”
items.summary_zh: 美国商品期货交易委员会表示，将遵循主要体育联盟的意见，确定哪些类型的预测市场合约最容易受到操纵。

items.title: Helping disaster response teams turn AI into action across Asia
items.summary: AI for Disaster Response in Asia: OpenAI Workshop with Gates Foundation
items.title_zh: 帮助救灾团队将人工智能转化为亚洲各地的行动
items.summary_zh: 亚洲救灾人工智能：与盖茨基金会合作的 OpenAI 研讨会

items.title: STADLER reshapes knowledge work at a 230-year-old company
items.summary: Learn how STADLER uses ChatGPT to transform knowledge work, saving time and accelerating productivity across 650 employees.
items.title_zh: STADLER 重塑一家拥有 230 年历史的公司的知识工作
items.summary_zh: 了解 STADLER 如何使用 ChatGPT 来转变知识工作，从而节省 650 名员工的时间并提高工作效率。

items.title: Powering product discovery in ChatGPT
items.summary: ChatGPT introduces richer, visually immersive shopping powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration.
items.title_zh: 推动 ChatGPT 中的产品发现
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 引入了由 Agentic Commerce Protocol 支持的更丰富、视觉沉浸式购物，从而实现产品发现、并排比较和商家集成。

items.title: How we monitor internal coding agents for misalignment
items.summary: How OpenAI uses chain-of-thought monitoring to study misalignment in internal coding agents—analyzing real-world deployments to detect risks and strengthen AI safety safeguards.
items.title_zh: 我们如何监控内部编码代理的错位
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何使用思想链监控来研究内部编码代理的错位——分析现实世界的部署以检测风险并加强人工智能安全保障。

items.title: A New Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents (EVA)
items.title_zh: 评估语音代理 (EVA) 的新框架

items.title: What's New in Mellea 0.4.0 + Granite Libraries Release
items.title_zh: Mellea 0.4.0 + Granite 库版本的新增功能

items.title: State of Open Source on Hugging Face: Spring 2026
items.title_zh: 拥抱开源的现状：2026 年春季

items.title: Holotron-12B - High Throughput Computer Use Agent
items.title_zh: Holotron-12B - 高吞吐量计算机使用代理

items.title: Introducing Storage Buckets on the Hugging Face Hub
items.title_zh: Hugging Face Hub 上引入存储桶

items.title: Keep the Tokens Flowing: Lessons from 16 Open-Source RL Libraries
items.title_zh: 保持代币流动：来自 16 个开源 RL 库的经验教训

items.title: Ulysses Sequence Parallelism: Training with Million-Token Contexts
items.title_zh: Ulysses 序列并行性：使用百万令牌上下文进行训练

items.title: LeRobot v0.5.0: Scaling Every Dimension
items.title_zh: 乐机器人 v0.5.0：扩展各个维度

items.title: Watch James Manyika talk AI and creativity with LL COOL J.
items.summary: In the latest episode of our Dialogues on Technology and Society series, LL COOL J sits down with James Manyika.
items.title_zh: 观看 James Manyika 与 LL COOL J 谈论人工智能和创造力。
items.summary_zh: 在我们的技术与社会对话系列的最新一集中，LL COOL J 与 James Manyika 进行了访谈。

items.title: Transform your headphones into a live personal translator on iOS.
items.summary: Google Translate’s Live translate with headphones is officially arriving on iOS! And we're expanding the capability for both iOS and Android users to even more countries…
items.title_zh: 将您的耳机变成 iOS 上的实时个人翻译器。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌翻译的耳机实时翻译功能正式登陆 iOS！我们正在将 iOS 和 Android 用户的功能扩展到更多国家/地区……

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is now available across Google products.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live：让音频AI更加自然可靠
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live 现已在 Google 产品中提供。

items.title: Search Live is expanding globally
items.summary: We’re expanding Search Live globally, to all languages and locations where AI Mode is available.
items.title_zh: Search Live 正在全球扩张
items.summary_zh: 我们正在全球范围内将 Search Live 扩展到支持 AI 模式的所有语言和地点。

items.title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more Google products
items.summary: We are bringing Lyria 3 to the tools where professionals work and create every day.
items.title_zh: Lyria 3 Pro：在更多 Google 产品中创建更长的曲目
items.summary_zh: 我们将 Lyria 3 引入专业人士每天工作和创作的工具中。

items.title: Bringing the power of Personal Intelligence to more people
items.summary: We're expanding Personal Intelligence across AI Mode in Search, the Gemini app and Gemini in Chrome.
items.title_zh: 将个人智能的力量带给更多人
items.summary_zh: 我们正在将个人智能扩展到搜索中的 AI 模式、Gemini 应用程序和 Chrome 中的 Gemini。

items.title: Our latest investment in open source security for the AI era
items.summary: Google is making new investments, building new tools and developing code security to improve open source security.
items.title_zh: 我们对人工智能时代开源安全的最新投资
items.summary_zh: 谷歌正在进行新的投资、构建新的工具并开发代码安全性，以提高开源安全性。

items.title: How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia
items.summary: A new Google AI initiative aims to improve heart health outcomes for people living in remote Australian communities.
items.title_zh: 人工智能如何帮助改善澳大利亚农村地区的心脏健康
items.summary_zh: 一项新的谷歌人工智能计划旨在改善生活在澳大利亚偏远社区的人们的心脏健康状况。

items.title: Gemini in Google Sheets just achieved state-of-the-art performance.
items.summary: Today we announced new beta features for Gemini in Sheets to help you create, organize and edit entire sheets, from basic tasks to complex data analysis — just describe …
items.title_zh: Google Sheets 中的 Gemini 刚刚实现了最先进的性能。
items.summary_zh: 今天，我们宣布了 Gemini in Sheets 的新测试版功能，可帮助您创建、组织和编辑整个工作表，从基本任务到复杂的数据分析 - 只需描述......

items.title: Seeing sounds
items.summary: Mariano Salcedo ’25, a master’s student in the new Music Technology and Computation Graduate Program, is designing an AI to visualize and express music and other sounds.
items.title_zh: 看到声音
items.summary_zh: Mariano Salcedo ' 25 是新音乐技术和计算研究生项目的硕士生，正在设计一种人工智能来可视化和表达音乐和其他声音。

items.title: How to create “humble” AI
items.summary: An MIT-led team is designing artificial intelligence systems for medical diagnosis that are more collaborative and forthcoming about uncertainty.
items.title_zh: 如何创造“谦逊”的人工智能
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院领导的团队正在设计用于医疗诊断的人工智能系统，该系统对于不确定性更具协作性和主动性。

items.title: What’s the right path for AI?
items.summary: Conference speakers discussed the unfolding trajectory of AI and the benefits of shaping technology to meet people’s needs.
items.title_zh: AI的正确道路是什么？
items.summary_zh: 会议发言人讨论了人工智能的发展轨迹以及塑造技术以满足人们需求的好处。
